samples.xml_description: Implement a multi-bit MUX-based synchronizer. The data_en signal is synchronous to clk_a and the data_in is constant during data_en is high. The data_en signal is sampled at clk_b and should be synchronized to clk_a. The data_in is sampled at clk_a and should be sampled at clk_b. Clock signal A. Clock signal B. Active-low reset signal A. Active-low reset signal B. Input data signal. Input enable signal. Output data signal. 0 1 Update data_reg on the positive edge of clk_a or the negative edge of arstn. If arstn is low, data_reg is set to 0. Otherwise, data_reg is set to data_in. if (!arstn) begin data_reg <= 0; end else begin data_reg <= data_in; end Update en_data_reg on the positive edge of clk_a or the negative edge of arstn. If arstn is low, en_data_reg is set to 0. Otherwise, en_data_reg is set to data_en. if (!arstn) begin en_data_reg <= 0; end else begin en_data_reg <= data_en; end Update en_clap_one and en_clap_two on the positive edge of clk_b or the negative edge of brstn. If brstn is low, en_clap_one and en_clap_two are set to 0. Otherwise, en_clap_one is set to en_data_reg and en_clap_two is set to en_clap_one. if (!brstn) begin en_clap_one <= 0; en_clap_two <= 0; end else begin en_clap_one <= en_data_reg; en_clap_two <= en_clap_one; end Update dataout on the positive edge of clk_b or the negative edge of brstn. If brstn is low, dataout is set to 0. Otherwise, if en_clap_two is 1, dataout is set to data_reg. Otherwise, dataout is set to dataout. if (!brstn) begin dataout <= 0; end else begin if (en_clap_two) begin dataout <= data_reg; end else begin dataout <= dataout; end end
